title: dicliptera elliotii
intro: Dicliptera elliotii, also known as Elliot's touch-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Dicliptera elliotii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
